title: rubus thyrsifloroideus
intro: Rubus thyrsifloroideus, also known as the Taiwan raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Taiwan. It is a perennial shrub with edible fruits that have been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus thyrsifloroideus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Rubus thyrsifloroideus can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
